title: conocephalus microphyllus
intro: Conocephalus microphyllus, also known as Microphyllus Grasshopper, is a type of plant that belongs to the family of grasses. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like wounds and eczema. The herbal preparations of Conocephalus microphyllus include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health issues.
